Node started: Given the initial tree structure and the final tree structure, identify the set of all sibling-merge operations required. An operation is defined by the pair of siblings (u, v) that are merged into a single node in the final tree. Output the list of all such required merge pairs.

Node started: Given the set of required merge operations and the dependency constraints (a merge operation on siblings can only occur if those siblings are currently existing nodes in the tree and no ancestor-descendant dependencies are violated), find a valid topological ordering of these operations that transforms the initial tree into the final tree.
